titleStmt.title: SII 5.759: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 759. (A.R. No. 195 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE VISVANATHA TEMPLE AT TENKASI, TENKASI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kojaṭilavarmma rāṉa tribhuvanaścakra vattikaḷ śrīparākramapāṇḍyade vaṟku yāṇṭu muppattoṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāvatu karkaṭaka ñāyaṟṟu Irupattoṉṟān tiyatiyum pūrvapakṣa ttu ccaturddaśi yum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirāṭattu nāḷ Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan
nācciyār Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiyanācciyāṟkut tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa teṉvārināṭṭu nallūrppaṟṟil tañcāvūṟpaṟṟukkum taṭṭāṉkuḷappaṟṟukkum perunāṉ kelkaiyāvatu kīḻelkai ceṅkoṭṭaiyilniṉṟum Ilattūṟkup pokiṟa vaḻikku meṟku teṉelkai
ceṅkoṭṭaiyil teṟkil piḷḷaiyār koyilukkum Ivvūrilniṉṟum nallūṟkup pokiṟa vaḻikkum Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan tevatāṉamāṉa vaḷḷaimuṭṭappaṟṟukkum vaṭakku melelkai nallūrilniṉṟum paimpoḻilukkup pokiṟa vaḻikkuk kiḻakku vaṭaelkai
Āṟṟukkut teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉ kelkaikkuṭpaṭṭa paṟṟil nañcey puñcai māvaṭai maravaṭai paṭṭaṭai koṭittoṭṭa maṟṟum Uṭpaṭṭa palavakaiyu muppattu Oṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāvatu mutalukku tevatāṉamāka viṭṭuk kaiyāṇṭukoḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immariyātiyile
Ivvāṇṭu mutal Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak koṇṭu candrāditya vaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivvālaiyam Uḷḷa Aḷavun tevatāṉamākak kaiyāṇṭukoḷḷavum pāṟka Ivai kiṭārattūr Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu tulyam
Digital edition of SII 5.759 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
